column1: # binaries.tsv — tools installed as prebuilt binaries into ~/bin.
#   name        make target + default binary name
#   owner/repo  GitHub repo whose *latest* release is queried
#   asset-regex extended regex matched against each asset's download URL
#   bins        space-separated binaries to pull out (defaults to <name>)
# Built for x86_64 Linux. Edit a regex here to change arch or pin behaviour.
